task_completion.description: Verify the Autopsy case 'DA_Report_Case_2024' is created with the correct case number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy main window showing the case name 'DA_Report_Case_2024' in the title bar or case details pane, and the case number 'INV-RPT-006'.

task_completion.description: Verify the disk image 'ntfs_undel.dd' is added as a data source to the case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy tree view on the left (under Data Sources) showing 'ntfs_undel.dd' loaded into the case.

task_completion.description: Verify that only the 'File Type Identification', 'Hash Lookup', and 'Recent Activity' ingest modules are selected or run.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Run Ingest Modules' configuration dialog showing only these three specific modules checked, or an ingest summary/progress bar indicating only these modules are running.

task_completion.description: Verify an HTML report is generated for the case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Generate Report' dialog showing 'HTML Report' selected and completed, or the 'Reports' node in the Autopsy tree view displaying the generated HTML report, or a browser showing the Autopsy HTML report index.

task_completion.description: Verify the case summary memo is written to /home/ga/Reports/case_summary_memo.txt with the required keys.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the contents of 'case_summary_memo.txt' containing the exact colon-separated keys: CASE_NAME, CASE_NUMBER, DATA_SOURCE, REPORT_FORMAT, REPORT_LOCATION, TOTAL_FILES_ANALYZED, INGEST_MODULES_RUN, and ANALYSIS_COMPLETE.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Autopsy GUI to perform the forensic analysis and report generation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the Autopsy application interface being interacted with (e.g., dialog boxes, progress bars, tree views), rather than just terminal commands bypassing the GUI.

integrity.description: Ensure the HTML report was genuinely generated by Autopsy.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report should appear under the 'Reports' node in the Autopsy tree view, or the report generation progress bar should be visible in screenshots.

integrity.description: Ensure the case summary memo contains actual computed values, not placeholder text copied directly from the prompt.
integrity.visual_evidence: The memo text must show a real file path for 'REPORT_LOCATION' (e.g., an actual directory path) and a real number for 'TOTAL_FILES_ANALYZED', rather than the literal strings '<full path to the directory containing the HTML index file>' or '<number of files analyzed/found>'.
